name: Eggplant Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 to 5 red chili peppers, seeded and chopped
1 to 3 tbsp yellow bean sauce (yellow bean sauce from Thailand is saltier than sauce from Hong Kong or China, so season to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice unpeeled eggplant crosswise into slices 1/8-inch thick.
2. Cut tofu into 1/2-inch cubes.
3. Heat oil in a skillet; add garlic and stir-fry until light brown (do not burn!).
4. Add eggplant and tofu to the skillet and cook for 5 to 7 minutes.
5. Add remaining ingredients and mix gently.
6. Serve immediately, as eggplant and basil will turn dark if the dish sits after cooking. Makes 3 to 4 servings.
